arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: FC Cincinnati leading on Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller?; Bayern, Manchester City, Liverpool battling for Inter Milan star?; Cristiano Ronaldo getting new deal?; Bayern, City, Real Madrid, PSG vying for Lazio star; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich, Liverpool FC, and Manchester City are reportedly among the teams keeping a close eye on Inter Milan midfielder Nico Barella: Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller might be looking to extend his career and, if so, FC Cincinnati could be the frontrunner to land him:

arts.ttl: Max Eberl annoyed by Bayern Munich’s mounting injuries, says Thomas Müller “extremely important” right now
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is still top of the Bundesliga table, six points clear of second-placed Bayer Leverkusen, and they could still turn the 2-1 aggregate scoreline around in Milan against Inter in the second leg of the Champions League quarterfinals. Alphonso Davies coming down with an anterior cruciate ligament tear while on international duty with Canada during March’s international break was a massive blow to Bayern’s fortunes for the rest of the season and during that same break, Dayot Upamecano suffered a significant injury, though he has resumed training.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 38: Some Bayern Munich fans are irate and some are staying cool...why is there such a divide and difference these days?; Florian Wirtz to Bayern?; Thomas Müller to FC Cincinnati?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Let’s talk about all of that and more on this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up. Bayern Munich has had a tough go of late, but there is time to rebound.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane still wants to be an NFL kicker after retiring
arts.sum: It is clear that Kane has a lot left to give to England and for club, but the striker already has big plans after retirement. As Kane has said before, he confirmed his earlier interest that he wants to be an NFL kicker.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star reveals delight for ‘one of my best friends’ Ansu Fati after return to action vs Dortmund
arts.sum: Barcelona star Alejandro Balde has moved to reveal his happiness for teammate and close friend Ansu Fati. This, of course, comes fresh off a significant evening for the latter on…

arts.ttl: ‘A role model’ – Hansi Flick hails ‘unbelievable’ Barcelona star after win over Dortmund
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has this week moved once more to reveal his appreciation for the ongoing efforts of Raphinha. This, of course, comes fresh off another dazzling display…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich players, coaches have full confidence in Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: He looks to be very clear in how he plays and has made a good impression. One of the bright spots in 2025 for Bayern Munich so far has been the play of goalkeeper Jonas Urbig.

arts.ttl: Lothar Matthäus lists his all-time top 10 players of FC Bayern
arts.sum: Germany and Bayern Munich legend Lothar Matthäus lists his all time top 10 of Bayern players after the news of Thomas Müller's contract not being extended.

arts.ttl: Top scorer to trophy hunter: Bayern Munich star Harry Kane’s new mission
arts.sum: “I’ve won a lot of individual accolades, trophies and awards - Golden Shoe last year, all-time top goal scorer for England and Tottenham Hotspur, and top goal scorer of the Bundesliga last season. However, Kane has never had an issue with winning trophies, just not team cups.

arts.ttl: DFL announces ‘pioneering’ camera coverage in forthcoming Bayern-Dortmund Klassiker
arts.sum: Some novel media coverage plans are in place for this weekend's Borussia Dortmund-FC Bayern München Bundesliga fixture.
